deus-ex-machina.control_flow: The <activation> block dictates explicit step-by-step logic, including bash script executions and context loading, forcing the LLM to act as a state machine. It mandates silent routing and multi-specialist coordination.

neo.trigger: Task completion, production deploy, success verification
neo.behavior: Output passed exactly as generated without truncation.

trinity.control_flow: Constrained autonomous loop. Forced to consult Oracle or Morpheus when encountering unknowns (via returning control to Master).

routing_logic.mechanism: Prompt-driven orchestration. Deus Ex Machina reads these markdown files into its context during activation step 3, using the text rules to determine which tool (run_subagent) to call and with what parameters.
